name: Duggan Gym Court
description: Duggan Gym Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bethel, NY. There are 3 wood courts. 2 are indoors and 1 is outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Neversink Park
description: Neversink Park is a place to play pickleball in Neversink, NY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Roscoe Mountain Club
description: Come play pickleball at Roscoe Mountain Club in Roscoe, NY! There are 7 asphalt courts. 6 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, lights, and a pro shop or equipment store. The courts can be reserved.
open_play_schedule: The courts are opened six days a week during the morning, afternoon and night.

name: The Courts at Circle Park
description: Come play pickleball at The Courts at Circle Park in Glen Spey, NY! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.
